changes: New Lyre Scripts structure: install and start lyre_bridge before this resource.
lyre_bridge is open source and is not included in Granted Assets ZIPs; download it here: https://github.com/lyrescripts/lyre_bridge
Bridge integrations for frameworks, inventories and target systems now live in lyre_bridge.
Release package cleaned and simplified; compare your old config with the new config before updating.
Add new configurations for tennis courts
Auto leave court when match end
Add spectators ball sync for training and tutorial modes
Fix PvP Ball Sync for spectators
Add config to change UI location
